verses.1: My heart overflows with a noble theme.
verses.2: You are the most excellent of the sons of men.
verses.3: Strap your sword on your thigh, O mighty one,
verses.4: In your majesty ride on victoriously on behalf of truth, humility, and righteousness.
verses.6: Your throne, God, is forever and ever.
verses.7: You have loved righteousness, and hated wickedness.
verses.8: All your garments smell like myrrh, aloes, and cassia.
verses.9: Kings’ daughters are among your honorable women.
verses.10: Listen, daughter, consider, and turn your ear.
verses.11: So the king will desire your beauty,
verses.12: The daughter of Tyre comes with a gift.
verses.13: The princess inside is all glorious.
verses.14: She shall be led to the king in embroidered work.
verses.15: With gladness and rejoicing they shall be led.
verses.16: Your sons will take the place of your fathers.
verses.17: I will make your name to be remembered in all generations.
